title: Shareable Gallery or Cards Views
excerpt: Frustratingly, we don’t seem to be able to share a files gallery view or cards widget to show images in a gallery. I have been informed this is due to privacy concerns.  I ask that a toggle switch be added to the widget …

posts.author: CoryN (Cory Neale)
posts.cookedHtml: Frustratingly, we don’t seem to be able to share a files gallery view or cards widget to show images in a gallery. I have been informed this is due to privacy concerns. I ask that a toggle switch be added to the widget so you can acknowledge the privacy concerns and overwrite the restriction.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cory! Indeed, the share option through the broadcast feature does not support these views at the moment.

However, your idea is great! I strongly encourage you to share this feedback on our community page’s dedicated section. Learn more here

posts.author: rickgainsmith (Rick Gainsmith)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know why this would be a missing feature. Strange.
